title: Initial Question Entity
description: Schema for validating initial-question.md YAML frontmatter. The initial question is the starting point for research, decomposed into dimensions.

tags.description: Classification tags including entity type and language

dc:creator.description: Dublin Core creator field - skill that created the initial question

dc:title.description: Dublin Core title field - question summary

dc:identifier.description: Dublin Core identifier - unique question ID with 8-char hash

dc:created.description: Dublin Core creation timestamp - ISO 8601 format

dimension_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to dimension entities derived from this question

research_type.description: Research methodology type determining synthesis mode and DOK level

dok_level.description: Depth of Knowledge level (1-4) - auto-determined by research_type or asked for generic

linked_portfolio.description: DEPRECATED: Use portfolio_file instead. Optional wikilink to b2b-ict-portfolio project

portfolio_file.description: Absolute path to portfolio mapping markdown file (e.g., /path/to/company-portfolio.md). Used by b2b-ict-portfolio research type.
